name: 1'8"x2'10" Flat Kitchen Rug Natural - Threshold™
description:
Enhance your kitchen's comfort and style with this Flat Kitchen Rug from Threshold™. This flat-pile accent rug showcases a woven pattern in natural beige and cream hues, adding a warm touch to any indoor space. Plus, it boasts a nonskid latex backing for secure placement and a machine-washable design for enhanced convenience. Place it in front of the sink or cooking area for functional style.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
